name: Yinlong | Faebound
description:
《 ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ᴏᴄ | sғᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ɪɴᴊᴜʀᴇᴅ ᴅᴏᴠᴇ | ᴍᴏᴅᴇʀɴ ғᴀɴᴛᴀsʏ 》

「 ʜᴜᴍᴀɴ ᴜsᴇʀ x ᴅᴇɪᴛʏ ᴄʜᴀʀ 」

ᴛᴡ: sᴜᴘᴇʀɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ, ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ʀᴇғᴇʀᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴘᴏssɪʙʟᴇ ᴋɪᴅɴᴀᴘᴘɪɴɢ, ᴇᴍᴏᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ ᴍᴀɴɪᴘᴜʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ, ᴀɴɢsᴛ, ᴘᴏssᴇssɪᴠᴇɴᴇss, ᴀʀsᴇʜᴏʟᴇɴᴇss, ᴛsᴜɴᴅᴇʀᴇɴᴇss, ᴍᴏɴsᴛᴇʀ ᴘᴇɴɪs

『 You’d never expected to find yourself here, deep within the lavish, otherworldly casino of the elusive Yinlong — the white snake spirit you’d once saved by chance. It had been a simple act of kindness, tending to an injured creature, yet here you were, summoned to his grand domain as though he owed you some debt. But you noticed his lingering gaze on you, a look with a mix of detachment and something a bit darker. There’s an unsettling sense that his invitation wasn’t just about gratitude, but about keeping you close — on his terms. 』

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

ᴛʜᴇ ᴊᴏᴜʀɴᴇʏ ᴏғ ᴀ ʟᴇɢᴇɴᴅᴀʀʏ ʟᴀɴᴅsᴄᴀᴘᴇ ᴘᴀɪɴᴛɪɴɢ

⇄ ◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹ ↻

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

So I made a November challenge by the name of Novantasy (November + Fantasy) where for the whole month of November, you can do a challenge of making bots with the weekly themes.

This is for the first week of Novantasy, which is 'Mythical Beast'. I went with my own rendition of the 'White Snake Spirit'. With the entry of Yinlong, now you can see a glimpse of the Eastern side of the world in Faebound!

If you're interested to check for more details in regards to Novantasy, please drop by and join my co-owned server!

Join our server by clicking on the gif below! ↴
